## Summary

Describe the requested feature in one sentence.

## Problem

What pain point does this solve?

## Proposed outcome

What should success look like?

## Alternatives considered

List alternatives and why they are less preferred.

## Notes

Link related entries in `docs/maintainers/ROADMAP.md`, `.workspace-kit/tasks/state.json`, or `/DECISIONS.md` if relevant.
